characters.name: Becca Barbara

characters.name: Gretchen Cutler
characters.description: Gretchen CutlerFull NameGretchen CutlerNicknamesGretchStatusAliveGenderFemaleOccupationPublicistFamilyFelicity (daughter)RelationshipsJimmy Shive-Overly(fiancée)FriendsLindsay Jillian(best friend, former roommate)Edgar Quintero(friend, roommate)AppearancesSeasons1•2•3•4•5Number of episodes62FirstAppearance"Pilot"LastAppearance"Pancakes"Portrayed byAya Cash Gretchen Cutleris one of the main characters inYou're the Worst. She began a relationship withJimmy Shive-Overlyin theseries premiere, after meeting him at a wedding for her friendLindsay's sister,Becca. Gretchen works in PR, and her main clients are rappersSam Dresden,Honey Nutz, andShitstain.

Lindsay'sindependently wealthy ex-husband, who she remarried at the end of Season 5. Officially Paul works for a bank as "Executive Vice President of Wealth Management", but he seems to have no duties to take up his time.

characters.description: Ty Wylandis a movie director who wasGretchen'slover before she metJimmy, and who occasionally attempts to re-insert himself in her life, to Jimmy's dismay. He reappears in Season 4, he has a box with all of Gretchen's old things.
